Fig. 2. Relative error (compared with benchmark CCG) across outof-distribution scenarios for different uncertainty sets. We evaluate four different uncertainty sets: box, polyhedral, elliposid, and GMM. L2OCCG consistently achieves comparable or lower error than Neur2RO across all settings, while maintaining tighter distributions and fewer extreme deviations. The results indicate strong generalization performance of the proposed method under distributional shifts.

Fig. 3. Computation time across out-of-distribution scenarios for different uncertainty sets. We evaluate four different uncertainty sets: box, polyhedral, elliposid, and GMM. L2O-CCG achieves orders-of-magnitude speedup compared to CCG and outperforms Neur2RO in most cases.
